prompt: Add environment variable override for config values

turns.content:
<task>
Add environment variable override support to the config parser. Env vars should take precedence over file values.
</task>

arguments.summary: Read src/conf/parser.rs — Config struct with from_file() (key=value parser) and get(). Need to add env var override: check env var before falling back to file value. Convention: key 'database_url' -> env var 'DATABASE_URL'.

next_steps.description: Add apply_env_overrides() to Config and call it in from_file()
Modify get() to check env var first

arguments.summary: Added env var override to src/conf/parser.rs. In from_file(), after parsing file, checks uppercase env var for each key and overrides if set. E.g., key 'database_url' overridden by env var 'DATABASE_URL'. All 3 tests pass.
arguments.final_answer: Added environment variable override support to Config in src/conf/parser.rs. File values are overridden by uppercase env vars. All 3 tests pass.
